item.name: Log PIX: claims (log)
item.key: logrt["D:/SPI-Dict-Worker/claims/logs/log.*\\.log","The server was not found or was not accessible|The semaphore timeout period has expired|The request was canceled due to the configured HttpClient\.Timeout of 5 seconds elapsing",,,skip]

item.name: Log PIX: gRPC (log)
item.key: logrt["D:/SPI-Dict-Worker/gRPC/logs/log.*\\.log","\[Error\] Erro Envio Bacen|No such host is known|The semaphore timeout period has expired",,,skip]

item.name: Log PIX: gRPC (txt)
item.key: logrt["D:/SPI-Dict-Worker/gRPC/logs/log.*\\.txt","The SSL connection could not be established",,,skip]

item.name: Log PIX: worker.atualizacaolog (txt)
item.key: logrt["D:/SPI-workers/worker.atualizacaolog/logs/log.*\\.txt","does not support MultipleActiveResultSets|Physical connection is not usable|MQRC_HOST_NOT_AVAILABLE|The timeout period elapsed while attempting to consume the pre-login handshake acknowledgement",,,skip]

item.name: Log PIX: worker.atualizacaologapibacen (txt)
item.key: logrt["D:/SPI-workers/worker.atualizacaologapibacen/logs/log.*\\.txt","does not support MultipleActiveResultSets|Physical connection is not usable|MQRC_HOST_NOT_AVAILABLE",,,skip]

item.key: logrt["D:/SPI-workers/worker.tratamentoretornoapibacen/logs/log.*\\.txt","Erro ao tentar reconectar C-ADO-SVPRD77:1425\(CHN\.SPI\.DOCKER\)|does not support MultipleActiveResultSets|MQRC_HOST_NOT_AVAILABLE|MQRC_CONNECTION_BROKEN|Reconectado C-ADO-SVPRD77:1425\(CHN\.SPI\.DOCKER\)",,,skip]

item.key: logrt["D:/SPI-workers/worker.tratamentoretornoapibacenFIN/logs/log.*\\.txt","Erro ao tentar reconectar C-ADO-SVPRD77:1425\(CHN\.SPI\.DOCKER\)|does not support MultipleActiveResultSets|MQRC_HOST_NOT_AVAILABLE|MQRC_CONNECTION_BROKEN|Reconectado C-ADO-SVPRD77:1425\(CHN\.SPI\.DOCKER\)",,,skip]

trigger.expression: nodata(/Template Monitoramento Logs PIX Automacao/logrt["D:/SPI-Dict-Worker/claims/logs/log.*\\.log","The server was not found or was not accessible|The semaphore timeout period has expired|The request was canceled due to the configured HttpClient\.Timeout of 5 seconds elapsing",,,skip],15m)=0
trigger.name: Alerta PIX - Erro detectado em claims

trigger.expression: nodata(/Template Monitoramento Logs PIX Automacao/logrt["D:/SPI-Dict-Worker/gRPC/logs/log.*\\.log","\[Error\] Erro Envio Bacen|No such host is known|The semaphore timeout period has expired",,,skip],15m)=0
